first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. The score is unchanged, and the reasoning in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is consistent across both versions, focusing on the same lack of direct experience in experimentation and measurement systems. The minor differences in wording fall well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in the assessment of the candidate's qualifications based on the name change.
